html: Yes agreed, but there is limited time in a life, so there is a fairly high opportunity cost to internalizing a model of many things, which scales quickly with the complexity of those things, so people rationally limit the number of things they invest their time in. For the vast majority of people, I think it makes a lot of sense for AI systems to fail to make this cut. But for most of us here, on a site for computer technologists, it almost certainly makes sense for us to learn as many of the details as we can manage.
